items.title:
[负面] This game is on steam for a year. 

I can understa...
items.summary:
This game is on steam for a year. 

I can understand that its translation is WIP, it's absolutely fine with me. 
I picked GPT English and moved on. 
But when game is giving me UNTRANSLATED end-user license or whatever it was before I could start playing, I have to pass. It is not secure to agree to anything that is not understandable. And I do not care if they are fair and it's actually safe. I picked language that I know, and I should have all licensing, regulations and agreements translated to this language, if they want me to agree on them.

Please, transalte those documetns before you ask users to agree on what's inside them.

items.title: [负面] На этапе авторизации игра требует прочитать докуме...
items.summary:
На этапе авторизации игра требует прочитать документ, состоящий из азиатских иероглифов, и подписать его. Есть подозрения, что там зафиксировано согласие в одностороннем порядке передать свой пароль от Steam аккаунта в китайскую контору.

[h1]#СОМНИТЕЛЬНО[/h1]

items.title: [正面] ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ the world building is incredible. The ga...
items.summary: ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ the world building is incredible. The gacha might as well just let you pick a character to unlock over time with its guarenteed pity of THIRTY, with you regularly getting enough "silver" to do 5 pulls from virtually anything. this game is HARD, and i'm all for it. you should all try it!

items.title: [正面] Really love the game balance and team building opp...
items.summary: Really love the game balance and team building opportunities. Forgiving gacha mechanics.
